finding_results.notes: The opening now makes the correction-grid logic legible on the page by distinguishing Martin-specific panic corrections from the separate Cliff homicide line, then tying Tommy uniquely to motive and dock exposure.
The closing image now matches canon: seven columns, Martin in the final slot, and the red circles explicitly identified as Martin's own marks.
Tommy is now characterized through Mallick's case reading and present-tense physical observation instead of repeating the age/job/family capsule.
The phone evidence now matches the established count of eight document photos.
The draft board is now described with seven columns, aligning it to the seven-man league.
Chapter word count is now 6645 while preserving the heading contract and the planned two-scene resolution structure.

summary: Expanded the chapter into a full-resolution sequence: Mallick's pre-dawn assembly of the case now makes the correction-grid payoff explicit, Tommy's confession now cleanly separates the shove from the later drowning choice, the aftermath gives the surviving men distinct consequence beats, and the closing casserole/draft-board images now land in continuity.
